texto_normalizado: The site is designed and engineered mobile-first as a methodology, not as a responsive afterthought. Every layout, interaction, and rule in this specification is to be implemented starting from the mobile viewport (375 px) and progressively enhanced upward to tablet (768 px) and desktop (1280 px and above). The opposite - designing desktop and "making it responsive" later- is non-conformant.
texto_original: The site is designed and engineered mobile-first as a methodology, not as a responsive afterthought. Every layout, interaction, and rule in this specification is to be implemented starting from the mobile viewport (375 px) and progressively enhanced upward to tablet (768 px) and desktop (1280 px and above). The opposite - designing desktop and "making it responsive" later- is non-conformant.
